---
title: "Contact"
---

**Karol Bolbotowski**  
Faculty of Mathematics, Informatics and Mechanics 
University of Warsaw 

Email: [k.bolbotowski@mimuw.edu.pl](mailto:k.bolbotowski@mimuw.edu.pl)

Office: [building / room]  
Address: [institutional address]

## Links

- [Google Scholar](https://scholar.google.com/citations?user=YOUR-ID)
- [ORCID](https://orcid.org/YOUR-ORCID)
- [arXiv](https://arxiv.org/search/math?searchtype=author&query=Bolbotowski%2C+K)
- [GitHub](https://github.com/YOUR-GITHUB-USERNAME)
